name: Gateway Webhook Daemon
description: 新增 crates/gateway/ binary crate，作為 long-running HTTP daemon，接收來自 Telegram 和 Discord 的 webhook/interaction 訊息，驅動 AgentRunCommand 執行並回覆。

userStories.title: 擴展 Config schema 支援 gateway 設定
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Config struct to support gateway configuration so that Telegram and Discord credentials can be loaded from ~/.ccode/config.toml.
acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] 在 crates/config/src/schema.rs 的 Config struct 新增 `pub gateway: Option<GatewayConfig>` 欄位
- [ ] 新增 GatewayConfig struct：port: Option<u16>, workdir: Option<String>, telegram: Option<TelegramConfig>, discord: Option<DiscordConfig>
- [ ] 新增 TelegramConfig struct：bot_token: String, webhook_secret: Option<String>
- [ ] 新增 DiscordConfig struct：application_public_key: String, bot_token: Option<String>

userStories.title: 建立 gateway crate 骨架與 main.rs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a new crates/gateway/ crate wired into the workspace so that I can run ccode-gateway as a standalone binary.
acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] 建立 crates/gateway/Cargo.toml，依賴：ccode-bootstrap, ccode-config, axum, tokio (rt-multi-thread+macros+signal), serde, serde_json, tracing, tracing-subscriber, thiserror, anyhow, reqwest, clap, ed25519-dalek = "2", hex = "0.4"
- [ ] 在 workspace root Cargo.toml 的 members 加入 "crates/gateway"
- [ ] main.rs 用 clap 解析 --port: Option<u16> 和 --workdir: Option<String>
- [ ] 讀取 config via ccode_config::load()，CLI flag 覆蓋 config 的 port/workdir
- [ ] cargo test -p ccode-bootstrap --test workspace_architecture 通過

userStories.title: 實作 agent_bridge — 將訊息橋接到 AgentRunCommand
userStories.description: As a gateway, I want to forward incoming text messages to AgentRunCommand and return the response so that Telegram/Discord users can interact with the AI agent.
acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] 定義 pub async fn run_agent(state: &AppState, text: String, session_id: Option<String>) -> anyhow::Result<String>
- [ ] 參考 crates/cli/src/cmd/agent.rs 模式建立 AgentRunCommand
- [ ] on_delta 收集 delta 字串到 Arc<Mutex<String>> buffer（不直接 print）
- [ ] execute_tool 無 confirmation prompt，直接呼叫 registry.execute
- [ ] 呼叫 cmd.run_with_metrics 並回傳完整 response 字串

userStories.title: 實作 Telegram webhook handler
userStories.description: As a Telegram bot, I want to receive webhook updates and reply with agent responses so that users can chat with the AI agent via Telegram.
acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] 定義最小必要型別：TelegramUpdate, TelegramMessage, TelegramChat
- [ ] 若設定了 webhook_secret，驗證 X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header；不符合回 401
- [ ] 取出 update.message.text 和 chat.id；非文字訊息回 200 OK（忽略）
- [ ] 呼叫 agent_bridge::run_agent 取得回應
- [ ] 用 reqwest 呼叫 https://api.telegram.org/bot{token}/sendMessage 回覆

userStories.title: 實作 Discord interactions handler（含 Ed25519 驗證）
userStories.description: As a Discord bot, I want to receive slash command interactions with Ed25519 signature verification and reply with agent responses so that users can chat with the AI agent via Discord.
acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] 定義型別：DiscordInteraction（type: u8, data: Option<DiscordInteractionData>, token: String, channel_id: Option<String>）
- [ ] 從 header 取 X-Signature-Ed25519（hex 解碼）和 X-Signature-Timestamp
- [ ] 驗證 timestamp + body 的簽名；失敗回 401
- [ ] 使用 axum::body::Bytes extractor 取原始 body（不先用 Json）

userStories.title: 實作 server.rs — Axum router 與 graceful shutdown
userStories.description: As a gateway operator, I want an Axum HTTP server with health check, Telegram and Discord routes, and graceful shutdown so that the daemon runs reliably in production.
acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] pub async fn start(state: AppState, port: u16, gateway_cfg: Option<GatewayConfig>) -> anyhow::Result<()>
- [ ] 建立 Arc<AppState> 作為 Axum shared state
- [ ] POST /webhook/telegram → telegram::handle（telegram config 存在時）否則 404
- [ ] POST /webhook/discord → discord::handle（discord config 存在時）否則 404
- [ ] Graceful shutdown：tokio::select! on ctrl_c() 和 UNIX SIGTERM (#[cfg(unix)])
- [ ] tracing::info!("gateway listening on :{}", port) 啟動日誌

userStories.title: 驗證與收尾
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all quality gates to pass and the gateway binary to respond correctly to manual curl tests so that the feature is production-ready.
acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] cargo test -p ccode-bootstrap --test workspace_architecture 通過
- [ ] curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/webhook/telegram 含合法 JSON 回傳 200 OK
